nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Sulawesi serpent eagle
nodes.summary: The Sulawesi serpent eagle (Spilornis rufipectus) is a species of bird of prey in the family Accipitridae. It is endemic to Sulawesi in Indonesia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest. It measures 46-54 cm long and has a wingspan of 105-120 cm. References

nodes.name: Spilornis
nodes.summary: Spilornis（Spilornis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如Great Nicobar serpent eagle、Sulawesi serpent eagle、Mountain serpent eagle等6种鸟类。

nodes.name: Sulawesi serpent eagle
